name: WP-L12-decorative-lowvision: hide decorative content from SR + text sizing
description: Findings: F-056 (decorative animations not hidden from screen readers — noise) · F-059 (decorative leading icons inside already-labeled banners not hidden) · F-060 (tiny 10px text in badges/labels). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: Decorative elements marked accessible=false / importantForAccessibility=no; minimum text size raised via design tokens (no hardcoded hex/persona checks — semantic tokens only).
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-decorative-lowvision)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #8 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-661 / WI-662.
Bundle rationale
Inverse of WP-2: where WP-2 made meaningful content audible, this hides MEANINGLESS content from screen readers (decorative animations, redundant icons) and fixes the 10px low-vision text floor.
Strategy
Decorative pass: importantForAccessibility='no-hide-descendants' / accessibilityElementsHidden on decorative animations and on leading icons inside already-labeled banners (the label carries the meaning; the icon is noise). Text floor: raise 10px text to the platform legibility floor using existing semantic type tokens — no new hex/sizes, use the design system's smallest sanctioned token.
Scope
In: F-056, F-059, F-060. Out: celebration/animation components' brand-fixed internals (allowed per AGENTS.md exception); any content that is the ONLY carrier of meaning (must stay accessible).
Findings
F-056 — Decorative animations not hidden from screen readers (noise).
F-059 — Decorative leading icons inside already-labeled banners not hidden.
F-060 — 10px text below the low-vision legibility floor.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Decorative animations and redundant banner icons hidden from SR; meaningful content untouched (per-site judgment recorded).
No text below the legibility floor; sizes via semantic tokens only.
Typecheck + related tests green.
Risk & blast radius
Low — additive a11y props + token swaps. Touches banner/animation components adjacent to WI-622's landed surface; rebase keep-both if needed.
